{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/35772301?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/fg0x0", "id": 35772301, "login": "fg0x0", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM1NzcyMzAx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47377", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "### Summary

The client-side `hashRedirect` plugin called `window.location.replace()` on a path extracted from the URL hash fragment after only checking `hashPath.startsWith('/')`. Protocol-relative URLs (`//attacker.com/…`) also satisfy that check, so a crafted link such as `https://nocodb.example/#//attacker.com/phishing` silently redirected visitors to an attacker-controlled origin.

### Details

In `packages/nc-gui/plugins/hashRedirect.client.ts`, the plugin extracted the hash content and normalised it into `cleanUrl`:

```ts
let cleanUrl = hashPath.startsWith('/') ? hashPath : `/${hashPath}`
if (hashQuery) cleanUrl += `?${hashQuery}`
window.location.replace(cleanUrl)
```

`startsWith('/')` returns true for `//attacker.com/...`, which browsers interpret as a protocol-relative absolute URL. No hostname check was performed before the redirect. The fix adds an early `if (/^\/[/\\]/.test(hashPath)) return` to reject protocol-relative paths.

### Impact

- Open redirect from any NocoDB origin to an attacker-controlled domain.
- No authentication required; the attack lands the victim on an attacker-controlled page that may impersonate a NocoDB login.

### Credit

This issue was reported by [@fg0x0](https://github.com/fg0x0).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00239, "percentile": 0.14804}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rvp5-9p55-f5rp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:00:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rvp5-9p55-f5rp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rvp5-9p55-f5rp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47377"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:00:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-rvp5-9p55-f5rp", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.04.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rvp5-9p55-f5rp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-rvp5-9p55-f5rp", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Open Redirect via Hash Fragment in hashRedirect Plugin", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:00:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rvp5-9p55-f5rp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.04.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.04.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Open Redirect via Hash Fragment in hashRedirect Plugin
